title: The Final Fight Begins
description: On pages 13–16, the final fight begins focuses on Luffy, Arlong, Nami, Sanji as luffy is freed and confronts Arlong directly, shifting the battle toward its final stage.
scene: On pages 13–16, the final fight begins focuses on Luffy, Arlong, Nami, Sanji as luffy is freed and confronts Arlong directly, shifting the battle toward its final stage.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: I don't know a thing about navigation either!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: I'm confident that I wouldn't be able to survive if other people aren't there to help me!

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: Shahahaha... aren't you quite honest about admitting how worthless you are!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Must be quite hard for your crewmates to deal with such an incompetent captain like you.

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: It's a wonder why'd they try so desperately hard to save you...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: You call yourself fit to be captain when you don't even have an ounce of self- confidence!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Just what exactly GAN YOU DO!?

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: I'll kill you if you lose...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: I am a shark after all. My teeth will grow back every time.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: And these new ones are always stronger than the last!

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: This is the gift bestowed to me by the heavens.

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: Just how much superior fishermen are?

summary: This part pushes the Arlong Park battle forward, clarifying who is fighting, what is at stake, and why Nami’s freedom matters.
